name: B_s - B_s_bar mixing phase phi_s
requirement: Any candidate framework must reproduce the measured CP-violating phase in B_s - B_s_bar mixing, phi_s = -2 beta_s, as extracted primarily from B_s -> J/psi phi at LHCb. The SM prediction (from CKM-fit beta_s) is small and negative; the LHCb 2024 update phi_s = -0.039 +/- 0.022 rad agrees with SM at 1 sigma.

regime.description: B_s system; sensitive to TeV-scale BSM contributions to the B_s mixing box diagrams.

current_bound.experiment: LHCb (B_s -> J/psi phi, J/psi pi+ pi-, etc.)
current_bound.reference: LHCb Collaboration, 'Measurement of the time-dependent CP asymmetries in B_s -> J/psi K+ K- decays', PRL 132, 051802 (2024), arXiv:2308.01468

what_it_excludes: Bounds new CP-violating contributions to B_s mixing at the TeV scale: |delta phi_s^NP| < 50 mrad. Constrains generic 4th-generation, leptoquark, and SUSY contributions; very little room remains for large new CP phases in this sector.

parameterization.name: Weak effective theory at scale m_b: Wilson coefficients C_1, ..., C_5 for the four-quark Delta B = 2 operators.
parameterization.reference: Buras, Misiak, Urban, NPB 586, 397 (2000); Lenz and Nierste, JHEP 0706, 072 (2007), hep-ph/0612167.
parameterization.summary: phi_s = arg(M_12), with M_12 the off-diagonal element of the B_s mass matrix. SM contribution dominated by W-top box; BSM contributions encoded as Delta C_1^NP.

procedural.predicted_observable: Time-dependent CP asymmetry in B_s -> J/psi phi, sin(2 beta_s) extracted from the interference between mixing and decay.
procedural.bound_in_parameterization: |Delta C_1^NP| < ~0.1 in standard normalization (TeV new physics with O(1) couplings excluded).
framework_inputs: Match framework onto Delta B = 2 effective theory; compute Wilson coefficients including all 5 LR operators.
Standard lattice matrix elements (Fermilab/MILC, RBC/UKQCD) needed for absolute predictions.

primary_references.citation: LHCb Collaboration, 'Measurement of the time-dependent CP asymmetries in B_s -> J/psi K+ K- decays', PRL 132, 051802 (2024)
Lenz and Nierste, 'Theoretical update of B_s - B_s_bar mixing', JHEP 0706, 072 (2007)
UTfit Collaboration, 'New UTfit Analysis of the Unitarity Triangle in the Cabibbo-Kobayashi-Maskawa scheme', Rendiconti Lincei 34, 37 (2023)
